subcodes.first_line: O thou who reliest upon God! True reliance consisteth in taking steps upon the path of God and freeing thyself from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوکل علی الله توکل را معنی حقیقی اینست که چون در سبیل الهی قدم نهی از هر
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
